theme: carving a radio filter from integer gears
title: Carving a Radio Filter from Integer Gears
strategies: do-nothing stencil (all teeth zero) -- reproduces the checker's own baseline
textbook design: exact real filter hitting PASS/STOP bins with DONTCARE pinned to zero, scale-to-budget, round pointwise, repair by shaving the largest coefficients

null-space noise shaping: the same PASS/STOP-exact particular solution, but DONTCARE bins are left as free real degrees of freedom and an error-feedback loop (round + least-squares re-fit into the DONTCARE subspace, iterated) steers the unavoidable integer-rounding residue into the unscored bins instead of the scored ones, then binary-searches the largest budget-feasible amplitude
alternatives: exact ILP/branch-and-bound over small instances, simulated annealing on the integer lattice, higher-order noise-shaping feedback filters
